title: Proclamation No. 706, s. 1970
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 706

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 63, DATED AUGUST 6, 1925, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE GOVERNMENT CENTER RESERVATION AND PROCLAMATION NO. 64, SERIES OF 1925 WHICH ESTABLISHED THE BURNHAM PARK RESERVATION, BOTH SITUATED IN BAGUIO CITY, CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE LAND EMBRACED THEREIN AND DECLARING THE SAME, TOGETHER WITH OTHER PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC AND PRIVATE DOMAIN OF THE GOVERNMENT SITUATED IN THE SAME CITY, OPEN TO DISPOSITION FOR TOURISM PURPOSES UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF ACT 3038 AND COMMONWEALTH ACT 141, AS AMENDED.

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 63, dated August 6, 1925, which established the government center reservation and Proclamation No. 64, series of 1925, which established the Burnham Park Reservation, both situated in Baguio City, certain portions (Lot 126-A, Ir-261; Lot 2, Ir-261; Lot “Y” and Lot “X”) of the land embraced therein and declare the same, together with other parcels of land (Lots 114-A, 3, 128, 115, 125, 126-B, 114-B and 1, Ir-261) of the public and private domain of the government as indicated hereunder situated in the same city, open to disposition for tourism purposes under the provisions of Act 3038 and Commonwealth Act 141, as amended, which parcels of land are more particularly described as follows:

Lot 126-A, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1) (To be excluded from Gov’t Center Reservation)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 126-A as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the SE. and SW., along lines 1-2-3, by Road; on the NW., along line 3-4, by Lot 126-B; and on the NE., along lines 4-5-1, by Lot 4 (Pines Hotel Site). Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, being N. 68 deg. 29 min. E., 206.02 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite.

thence S. 47 deg. 15 min. W., 50.00 meters to point 2; thence N. 45 deg. 30 min W, 155.54 meters to point 3; thence N. 45 deg. 00 min. E., 12.14 meters to point 4; thence S. 77 deg. 24 min. E, 103.56 meters to point 5; thence S. 31 deg. 52 min. E., 71.91 meters to point of beginning containing an approximate area of seven thousand four hundred ninety-six (7,496) square meters.

Lot 2, Ir-261 (Public Land) (To be excluded from Gov’t. Center Reservation)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2 as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the N., along line 1-2, by Lot 1 of plan Ir-261; en the E., and SE., along lines 2-3-4-5-6-7, by Public Land; and on the SW. and W., along lines 7-8-9-10-1, by Luneta Cut-of-Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 16 deg. 06 min. E., 465.12 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence EAST 43.85 meters to point 2; thence S. 20 deg. 02 min. E., 39.99 meters to point 3; thence S. 2 deg. 49 min. E., 41.75 meters to point 4; thence S. 2 deg. 04 min, W., 49.83 meters to point 5; thence S. 10 deg. 15 min. W., 35.97 meters to point 6; thence S. 39 deg. 53 min. W., 19.88 meters to point 7; thence N. 34 deg. 22 min. W., 11.87 meters to point 8; thence N. 1 deg. 12 min. W., 35.91 meters to point 9; thence N. 1 deg. 12 min. W., 35.91 meters to point 10; thence N. 16 deg. 46 min. W., 92.03 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of five thousand six hundred and six (5,606) square meters.

Lot “Y” (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1) (To be excluded from Gov’t. Center Reservation)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot “Y” as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the S., and SW., along lines 1-2-3, by Harrison Street; on the NW., along line 3-4, by Lot “X”; and on the NE., along line 4-1, by Lot 126-A. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, being N. 74 deg. 58 min. E., 160.43 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence N. 88 deg. 46 min. W., 33.80 meters to point 2; thence N. 47 deg. 11 min. W., 131.00 meters to point 3; thence N. 44 deg. 30 min. E., 27.00 meters to point 4; thence S. 45 deg. 30 min. E., 155.54 meters to the point of beginning; containing an approximate area of three thousand five hundred sixty-eight (3,568) square meters.

Lot “X” (Public Land) (To be excluded from Burnham Park, Reservation)

A parcel of Land (Lot “X” as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the NE., along- line 1-2, by Lot 126-B; on the SE., along line 2-3, by Lot “Y”; on the SW., along line 3-4, by Harrison Street; and on the W., along line 4-1, by Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, being N. 7 deg. 46 min. W , 225.93 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence S. 45 deg. 30 min. E., 104.46 meters to point 2; thence S. 44 deg. 30 min. W., 27.00 meters to point 3; thence N. 47 deg. 11 min. W., 65.26 meters to point 4; thence N. 9 deg. 07 min. W., 48.75 meters to the point of beginning; containing an approximate area of two thousand three hundred ninety-one (2,391) square meters.

Lot 114-A, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1)

A Parcel of Land (Lot 114-A of Res. Sec. “A”, as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the City of Baguio. Bounded on the S., along line 1-2, by Lot 4 (Pines Hotel Site); on the NW., along line 2-3, by Road; and on the NE., along line 3-1, by Lot 114-3 of Res. Sec. “A”. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, thence Due WEST 50.25 meters to point 2; thence N. 18 deg. 03 min. E., 78.08 meters to point 3; thence S. 20 deg. 25 min. E., 76.18 meters to the point of beginning; containing an approximate area of one thousand six hundred ten (1,610) square meters.

Lot 3, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 3 as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the IS., along line 1-2, by Lot 128; on the S., along line 2-3, by Lot 115, both of plan Ir-261; and on the W., and N., along lines 3-4-5-6 7-8-1, by Public Land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 2 deg. 08 min. E., 455.47 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence S. 19 deg. 08 min. W., 98.94 meters to point 2; thence S. 82 deg. 54 min. W., 10.60 meters to point 3; thence N. 7 deg. 04 min. W., 72.46 meters to point 4; thence N. 5 deg. 40 min. W., 14.90 meters to point 5; thence N. 27 deg. 11 min. E., 11.12 meters to point 6; thence N. 67 deg. 11 min. E., 35.93 meters to point 7; thence N. 83 deg. 12 min. E., 8.53 meters to point 8; thence S. 21 deg. 35 min. E., 18.04 meters to point of beginning; containing an area of three thousand five hundred twenty two (3,522) square meters.

Lot 128, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 128 as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the N., along line 1-2, by Public Land; on the E.; along line 2-3, by Lot 4 Plan Swo-19505 (Pines Hotel Site); on the S., along line 3-A, by Lot 115; and on the W., along line 4-1, by Lot 3, both of plan Ir-261. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 2 deg. 08 min. E., 455.47 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence S. 66 deg. 32 min. E., 20.80 meters to point 2; thence S. 3 deg. 18 min. E., 87.86 meters to point 3; thence N. 87 deg. 27 min. W., 56.62 meters to point 4; thence N. 19 deg. 08 min. E., 98.94 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of three thousand five hundred (3,500) square meters.

Lot 115, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 115 as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Ees. Sec. “A” City of Baguio. Bounded on the S., along line 1-2, by Lot “B” of plan Ir-261; on the W., along line 2-3, by Public Land; on the N., along line 3-4, by Lot 3 and along line 4-5, by Lot 128, both of plan Ir-261; and on the E., along line 5-1, by Lot 4 of plan Swo-19505 (Pines Hotel Site). Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 8 deg. 39 rain. E., 298.01 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence N. 89 deg. 15 min. W., 60.00 meters to point 2; thence N. 9 deg. 27 min. W., 65.85 meters to point 3; thence N. 82 deg. 54 min. E., 10.00 meters to point 4; thence S. 87 deg. 27 min. E., 56.62 meters to point 5; thence S. 3 deg. 18 min. E., 64.65 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of four thousand one hundred fifty seven (4,157) square meters.

Lot 125, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 125 as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A” City of Baguio. Bounded on the W., along line 1-2, by Public Land; on the N., E. and S., along lines 2-3-4-5, by Lot “B” of plan Ir-261; and on the W., along line 5-1, by Public Land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 7 deg. 45 min. W., 225.92 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence N. 29 deg. 40 min. W., 12 00 meters to point 2; thence N. 27 deg. 24 min. E., 34.98 meters to point 3; thence S. 60 deg. 45 min. E., 20.00 meters to point 4; thence S. 11 deg. 30 min. W., 40.00 meters to point 5; thence N. 69 deg. 00 min. W., 21.00 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of one thousand and one (1,001) square meters.

Lot 126-B, Ir-261 (Part of Certificate of Title No. 1)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 126-A as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by Lot 126-A, Ir-261; on the SW., along line 2-3, by Road; on the NE., W. and SW., along lines 3-4-5-6, by Lot 125; on the W., along line 6-7, by Road; on the N., along line 7-8, by Lot 115; and on the E., along line 8-1, by Lot (Pines Hotel Site). Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, being N. 18 deg. 17 min. E., 167.68 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence S. 45 deg. 00 min. W., 12.14 meters to point 2; thence N. 45 deg. 30 min. W., 104.46 meters to point 3; thence S. 69 deg. 00 min. E., 21.00 meters to point 4; thence N. 11 deg. 30 min. E., 40.00 meters to point 5; thence N. 60 deg. 45 min. W., 20.00 meters to point 6; thence N. 9 deg. 47 min. E., 30.55 meters to point 7; thence S. 89 deg. 15 min. E., 60.00 meters to point 8; thence S. 3 deg. 18 min. E., 135.62 meters to the point of beginning; containing an approximate area of seven thousand two hundred eighty-nine (7,289) square meters.

Lot 114-B, Ir-261 (Public Land)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 114-B of Res. Sec. “A” as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the City of Baguio. Bounded on the S., along line 1-2, by Lot 4 (Pines Hotel Site); on the SW., along line 2-3, by Lot 114-A; on the W., N. and NE., along lines 3-4-5-6-7-1, by Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, thence Due WEST 22.75 meters to point 2; thence N. 20 deg. 25 min. W., 76.18 meters to point 3; thence N. 18 deg. 03 min. E.,17.03 meters to point 4; thence N. 0 deg. 50 min. W.,20.65 meters to point 5; thence N. 76 deg. 46 min. E.4.72 meters to point 6; thence S. 36 deg. 20 min. E.,26.19 meters to point 7; thence S. 20 deg. 19 min. E., 97.08 meters to the point of beginning; containing an approximate area of three thousand three hundred sixteen (3,316) square meters.

Lot 1 Ir-261 (Public Land)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 1 as shown on the attached Sketch Plan), situated in the Res. Sec. “A”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2, by Luneta Cut-of-Road; on the NE., along lines 2-3-4-5, by Session Road; and on the SE., along line 5-1, by Lot 2 of the attached Sketch Plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan, being N. 16 deg. 06 min. E., 465.12 meters from Triangulation Station HAPPY, Baguio Townsite, thence N. 11 deg. 17 min. W., 73.55 meters to point 2; thence S. 75 deg. 48 min. E.,8.56 meters to point 3; thence S. 24 deg. 25 min. E., 33.39 meters to point 4 thence S. 47 deg. 38 min. E., 59.64 meters to point 5 thence Due WEST 45.85 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of one thousand five hundred forty-four (1,544) square meters. NOTE: All data are approximate and subject to change based on future survey.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 19th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President: PONCIANO G. A. MATHAY Acting Executive Secretary

Source: Presidential Management Staff
